mano_cua.result_summary: 末端回退(backtrack)导致渲染异常：线条末端出现'喇叭口'外张形态而非锥形收细。对比测试确认：正常直线末端正常收笔，反向移动后松开的末端向外扩展。根因是库用末端移动方向计算轮廓但回退方向与主体方向相反导致闭合曲线计算错误
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Line end backtrack causes 'flare/trumpet' shape instead of tapered end. Comparison test: Line A (normal) shows proper taper, Line B (with end reversal) shows outward flare at end point. Library calculates end outline from movement direction, but reversed direction causes incorrect closure curve.
